Fix event order and callback calling during container creation
Add command result support for resource commands
Remove ModelContextProtocol.AspNetCore package version
Clean up pr-docs-hook workflow to use env vars for step outputs

Move Python starter template to TypeScript AppHost and CLI template factory
[release/13.2] Fix migration from .aspire/settings.json to aspire.config.json
[release/13.2] Export more importable ATS hosting APIs
[release/13.2] Fix guest AppHost launch profile env propagation
[release/13.2] Allow filtering endpoints from the default reference set
[release/13.2] Fix aspire new: move OpenEditor after agent init prompt
Backport E2E test refactoring
Add AspireExport coverage for Aspire.Hosting.Azure.ServiceBus
Write empty JSON from aspire ps to stdout
Always display message when no app host, share common resource strings
Merge release/13.2 into main (manual conflict resolution)
Remove mention of .NET in Aspire CLI settings schema
Fix call stack exceeded frontend error by ensuring dialog close before nested dialog opens
Fix port mismatch for bait-and-switch resources in Kubernetes publisher
Fix Windows bundle build: add Bundle.proj payload step to ADO pipeline
Revert "Fix port mismatch for bait-and-switch resources in Kubernetes publisher"
Fix LogsCommand to sort results by timestamp
Add shortcut for aspire run --detached via aspire start
Remove test-scenarios infrastructure
Update release/13.2 DCP version to 0.22.7
Enable container tunnel by default
Add backchannel log replay for TUI support
aspire-managed unified binary + native certificate management
Fix CLI installation scripts to work when Aspire is running
Add tests around capturing logs from DistributedApplicationBuilder on failures
Accept whole-number ATS values for integral parameters
Migrate `DotnetToolResource` to use `RequiredCommandValidator`
Add Windows CLI starter validation
Port: Fix installing playwright-cli with aspire agent init on Windows
Port: Simplify TelemetryApiService.GetTrace and support short trace IDs
Port: Strip /login path from dashboard base URL in describe command
[main] Fix config boolean handling: crash on read, wrong types on write
[release/13.2] Fix TS AppHost restore config resolution
[release/13.2] Simplify TelemetryApiService.GetTrace and support short trace IDs
Updated the vs code activity bar icon to look slightly more cohesive
Disable macOS GitHub Actions jobs by default; opt-in Templates tests on non-PR runs
Make startup-perf skill work on Mac/Linux
Add rebuild guidance to Aspire skill for per-resource code changes
[release/13.2] Handle brownfield TypeScript aspire init
Fix install script swallowing file-lock errors and reporting false success
Create bugs as bug issues rather than tagging them as bugs
Review feedback on dashboard skill
Update Hex1b.* packages from 0.90.0 to 0.97.0
[main] Update dependencies from microsoft/dcp
LogsCommand improvements

Fix Aspire CLI ANSI detection
Remove vendored OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient code
Add `WithMcpServer` extension method for fluent MCP server endpoint configuration
Add FluentUI packages to dependency-update skill's special handling list
Add skill for dashboard testing
Improve aspire config list output formatting
CLI: Grouped help, command renames, and ergonomics cleanup
Fix port mismatch for bait-and-switch resources in Kubernetes publisher
Add ACA Managed Redis deployment E2E test
Add [Experimental] attribute to WithCompactResourceNaming API
Improve Azure deployment error output
Redirect human-readable messages to stderr when --format json is used
Update external NuGet dependencies to latest versions

fix: add -UseBasicParsing to Invoke-WebRequest in get-aspire-cli.ps1
